overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a yellow vehicle driving through Los Santos at night. The car navigates residential streets with palm trees and commercial buildings, passing pedestrians and stop signs before approaching the downtown skyline with neon-lit buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial and residential street with storefronts

agents.ego_description: driving straight through urban street at steady speed, passing commercial buildings and billboards

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with illuminated signage on the right side of the street
tall palm trees lining the center of the street
large illuminated billboard advertising liquor with colorful graphics
tall street lamps providing artificial lighting along the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives straight through a mixed urban area at night, passing commercial buildings with illuminated signs on the right and residential structures on the left. Palm trees line the street while streetlights cast pools of light on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential neighborhood intersection with parked vehicles

events.description: vehicle executes right turn at intersection entering residential area
group of three pedestrians becomes visible standing on sidewalk near dumpster

agents.ego_description: making right turn at intersection and continuing through residential neighborhood

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians standing together on sidewalk near green dumpster

entered.detail: red compact car parked on the right side of the street
large green industrial dumpster on the sidewalk
silver sedan parked on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: After turning right at the intersection, the vehicle enters a residential area with parked cars on both sides. A group of three pedestrians stands on the right sidewalk near a green dumpster, while single-story houses line the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential intersection with stop sign control

events.description: pedestrian in light clothing crosses the road from right to left ahead of vehicle
vehicle slows to stop and makes right turn at stop sign intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching stop sign, slowing to yield, and turning right while pedestrian crosses

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street from right to left in front of the vehicle

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign at the approaching intersection
white painted crosswalk markings on the asphalt
tall illuminated skyscrapers visible in the distance indicating downtown area

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a stop sign at a residential intersection where a pedestrian is crossing the street. After yielding, the car turns right, revealing the illuminated downtown skyline in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone approaching downtown with neon commercial signage

events.description: entering area with prominent red neon signage and industrial fencing as downtown approaches
vehicle makes left turn at intersection with yield signs

agents.ego_description: driving toward downtown with neon-lit buildings visible, then turning left at yield intersection

entered.detail: low building with bright red neon strip lighting along the roofline
tall black metal fence running along the right side of the road
red and white triangular yield sign at the intersection
tall modern skyscrapers with illuminated windows dominating the skyline

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives toward the downtown area where red neon signs and industrial buildings become prominent. The car passes a fenced area on the right before making a left turn at an intersection with yield signs, with tall illuminated skyscrapers visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet urban neighborhood that gradually opens up to reveal a glowing downtown skyline. It begins by driving straight through a mixed district where illuminated commercial signs and palm trees line the asphalt under the glow of streetlights. As the vehicle turns right, the environment shifts into a residential area characterized by single-story houses, parked cars, and pedestrians gathered on the sidewalks. The scene then progresses through a residential intersection, yielding to a crossing pedestrian before turning right to uncover the distant, shimmering lights of the city center. Finally, the camera moves toward the downtown core, passing industrial buildings and red neon signs before turning left toward a cluster of towering, illuminated skyscrapers.
